project.name: Supir-Vast :: vastir-pbr
project.description: PBR surface-shader authoring at the core IR level, ShaderLab-style: choose which surface channels a material exposes (albedo, metallic, roughness, normal, AO, emissive, opacity) and supply a surface function that computes each as a core expression; the layer generates a vertex+fragment pair running a Cook-Torrance metallic-roughness lighting model and hands back a GraphicsPipelineSpec. Reusable and front-end-neutral; no parser (authoring is at the AST/IR level).
